title: Compliance: lichen/subsys/lichen/link/schnorr48.c Schnorr48 implementation
description: Policy: 06-security.md §8.3. File: lichen/subsys/lichen/link/schnorr48.c. Status: COMPLIANT. Implements Schnorr48 per spec using Monocypher: schnorr48_sign() (L58-133) produces 48-byte signature with deterministic nonce. schnorr48_verify() (L135-194) performs R' recovery via crypto_eddsa_recover_r(), constant-time comparison via crypto_verify16(). Frame helpers correctly validate inputs and build signable data.
